title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_show
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_show' MCP tool.

rootIndex.description: 0-based index into the MCP file roots list; ignored when workspaceRoot is set.

ref.description: Commit reference (SHA, branch, tag, or any git rev-spec).

path.description: Optional single file path to inspect at the ref. Merged with `paths` when both are provided.

paths.description: Optional list of file paths to filter the shown diff/stat. Merged with `path` when both are provided.

stat.description: When true, show --stat diffstat (files changed summary) instead of the full patch.
